config.name: linux_auth-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: linux_auth-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:23:21.621556

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local ipairs = ipairs

-- Validation patterns
local IP_PATTERN = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"
local PORT_PATTERN = "^%d+$"

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with static fields
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF classification
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "Logon",
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management", 
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication",
        type_uid = 300201,
        type_name = "Authentication: Logon"
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        local ts = tonumber(record.timestamp)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts
        else
            output.time = os_time() * 1000
        end
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Efficient field mappings with validation
    if record.hostname then
        output.src_endpoint = output.src_endpoint or {}
        output.src_endpoint.hostname = record.hostname
    end

    if record.username then
        output.user = output.user or {}
        output.user.name = record.username
    end

    -- Process information
    if record.process_name or record.process_id then
        output.actor = output.actor or {}
        output.actor.process = output.actor.process or {}
        output.actor.process.name = record.process_name
        output.actor.process.pid = tonumber(record.process_id)
    end

    -- Network information with validation
    if record.src_ip then
        if string_match(record.src_ip, IP_PATTERN) then
            output.src_endpoint = output.src_endpoint or {}
            output.src_endpoint.ip = record.src_ip
        end
    end

    if record.src_port then
        local port = tonumber(record.src_port)
        if port and port > 0 and port < 65536 then
            output.src_endpoint = output.src_endpoint or {}
            output.src_endpoint.port = port
        end
    end

    -- Authentication details
    if record.auth_method then
        output.auth_protocol = record.auth_method
    end

    if record.status then
        output.status = record.status
    end

    if record.message then
        output.message = record.message
    end

    if record.session_id then
        output.session = output.session or {}
        output.session.uid = record.session_id
    end

    -- Final validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, "Transform error: " .. tostring(result)
    end
    return result
end
